title: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bhopal is a city in Madhya Pradesh with a population of 2,500,000. The capital of Madhya Pradesh, known for its beautiful lakes, Mughal and Rajput architecture, and lush green parks.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
